about_me

The person behind the build

I am someone who gets genuinely excited about how things work under the hood — not just building stuff, but understanding what keeps it safe, what keeps it running, and what keeps it from costing a fortune. That is what pulled me toward cloud infrastructure and security.

I went straight at the deep end. I designed and deployed a complete cloud audit system on AWS — the kind of system that enterprise companies pay consultants serious money to build. No code. Just architecture, configuration, and a clear understanding of why each piece matters.

I bring a background in Information Technology from Osmania University, Hyderabad, and hands-on DevOps experience from my internship at Full Stack Academy where I sharpened my Linux and AWS skills. Now completing my Masters at Elmhurst University, Illinois.

Project Documentation
Automated Cloud Infrastructure Audit System
About This Project

Cloud computing is everywhere — but most cloud projects look the same. Spin up an EC2 instance, host a website on S3, build a serverless function. These are useful, but not what cloud teams actually spend their time doing.

The reality is that most enterprise cloud work is about governing, securing, monitoring, and auditing infrastructure. This project answers all of those questions — automatically — with a complete AWS governance system running 24/7.

This is not a tutorial project. This is the kind of infrastructure that companies pay consultants thousands of dollars to set up.

Results at a Glance
Security Rules Active
22 AWS Managed Rules
Noncompliant Rules
34 Detected
Compliant Rules
35 Passing
At-Risk Resources
6 Found
Critical Finding
9 Unrestricted Security Groups
Monthly Budget
$100 — 3 alert thresholds
Billing Alarm
CloudWatch at $10 via SNS
Total Project Cost
$0.00 USD
AWS Services
AWS ConfigRecords every resource change continuously — evaluates against 22 security rules
AWS Security HubCentral command center — aggregates all security findings into one dashboard
IAM Access AnalyzerScans every resource for unintended external access permissions
AWS Trusted AdvisorBest practice checks across security, cost, performance, and fault tolerance
Amazon SNSAlert engine — real-time email notifications for every violation
AWS BudgetsCost governance — monthly spend with alerts at 85% and 100%
Amazon CloudWatchReal-time billing alarm — triggers instantly when charges exceed $10
AWS Cost ExplorerFinancial visibility — tracks spending across all 13 active services
Key Findings
🔴 CRITICAL — Unrestricted Security Groups
9 of 9 security group rules allow 0.0.0.0/0 — any IP on the internet can attempt connection.
🔴 HIGH — CloudTrail Not Enabled
No audit trail exists for any user or API action in the account.
🔴 HIGH — GuardDuty Not Active
No AI-powered threat detection running in the account.
🟡 MEDIUM — IAM MFA Gaps
MFA not enforced for all IAM users and console access.
Conclusion

This project demonstrates a practical, working solution covering security, compliance, and cost governance simultaneously. The system is live, continuously running, and producing real findings.

The technology is real. The findings are real. The system is real.

Mohammed Abdul Umair Uddin · March 2026
